items.title: Long Run
items.description: Run 10 km at a pace of 6:00 min/km. Aim to keep your heart rate in Zone 2 (130-150 bpm).

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: Perform 5 x 800m intervals at a pace of 5:30 min/km with 2 minutes of recovery jog between each interval. Keep your heart rate in Zone 4 (160-175 bpm) during the intervals.

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at an easy pace of 7:30 min/km. Keep your heart rate below 140 bpm to aid recovery.

items.title: Strength Training
items.description: Focus on full-body strength training with 3 sets of 10-12 reps for each exercise (squats, lunges, push-ups, and planks). Rest for 60 seconds between sets.
